name: input-field-unit
title: BTInputFieldUnit
description: Split input combining a fixed-width unit selector dropdown (left, ~88px) with a floating-label text field (right, flex-1). Both panels share a single border that activates (brand-primary) when either side is focused or the dropdown is open. Supports error, disabled, and formatter states.

export { BTInputFieldUnit } from './BTInputFieldUnit';
